next_steps: Perform ultrasound-guided or direct endoscopic biopsy of the nasopharyngeal/parapharyngeal mass for histopathology
Order serum ANCA (PR3 and MPO), IgG4 levels, and ACE levels
Perform a urinalysis to check for hematuria or proteinuria
Order a chest CT scan to evaluate for pulmonary nodules or airway involvement
Coordinate with neurology for detailed cranial nerve assessment
Initiate urgent ophthalmology consultation due to facial nerve and ocular involvement
Perform ultrasound-guided or direct endoscopic biopsy of the nasopharyngeal mass with tissue sent for histopathology, GMS/PAS stains, and culture
Order serum ANCA (PR3 and MPO) and IgG4 levels
Perform urinalysis with microscopy for red cell casts
Obtain high-resolution chest CT scan to evaluate for pulmonary involvement
Order infectious disease serologies including RPR/VDRL and QuantiFERON-TB Gold
Coordinate urgent multidisciplinary review involving ENT, Rheumatology, and Infectious Disease
Initiate ocular protection for facial nerve weakness and monitor for corneal exposure
